---
name: Topic / Lesson submission
about: Propose a new topic or lesson
title: "[TOPIC] <language> / <level> — <short title>"
labels: content, topic
assignees: ''
---

## Topic details

| Field              | Value |
|--------------------|-------|
| Language           | <!-- e.g. Python --> |
| Level              | <!-- new / beginner / intermediate / advanced --> |
| Title              | |
| Unique ID          | <!-- e.g. py-beginner-loops --> |
| Estimated minutes  | |

## Description

One-sentence summary of what the topic covers.

## Lessons outline

List the lessons (title + short body summary):

1. **Lesson title** — what it explains
2. **Lesson title** — what it explains
3. ...

## Checklist

- [ ] ID follows `<lang-abbr>-<level>-<slug>` format
- [ ] All required keys are present (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `scripts/validate_json.py` passes locally
